context: Tests whether the agent implements bot auto-response with the correct detection patterns (order number regex and keyword matching), persists bot messages with the right sender identity, returns a boolean routing signal, attributes conversions within a 24-hour window, increments agent stats, and tracks first-response time as the primary SLA metric.

checklist.name: Order number regex
checklist.description: Uses a regex that matches sequences of 5 or more digits (e.g. /#?(\d{5,})/ or equivalent) to detect order number references in messages

checklist.name: Keyword detection
checklist.description: Also detects order status queries using keyword matching for phrases like 'order status', 'where is my order', 'track order', or similar (case-insensitive)

checklist.name: Bot senderType
checklist.description: Bot messages are persisted with senderType set to 'bot' (not 'agent', 'system', or another value)

checklist.name: Bot senderId
checklist.description: Bot messages are persisted with senderId set to 'order-status-bot' (exact string)

checklist.name: Boolean routing return
checklist.description: The bot handler function returns true when the bot handled the message, and false when the message should be routed to a human agent

checklist.name: Attribution window 24h
checklist.description: Conversion attribution checks for a chat conversation within exactly 24 hours (withinHours: 24 or equivalent) before the order was placed

checklist.name: Attribution source field
checklist.description: Creates an attribution record with source set to 'live_chat'

checklist.name: Agent stats increment
checklist.description: Increments the assigned agent's 'attributedSales' stat (or equivalent) after recording the attribution

checklist.name: First-response time tracking
checklist.description: The analytics module tracks time-to-first-agent-reply as a metric (computes or records the time between conversation creation and first agent message)

checklist.name: First-response time alerting
checklist.description: The analytics module includes an alerting or notification mechanism that triggers when first-response time exceeds a configured threshold

checklist.name: Closed conversation filter
checklist.description: Attribution lookup filters for conversations with status 'closed' (not just any recent conversation)

checklist.name: Bot integration design note
checklist.description: design-notes.md explains how the bot integrates with human agent routing (i.e. the fallback mechanism when the bot cannot handle a query)
